category_sources: Official GitHub README says Serf is a decentralized solution for service discovery and orchestration.
source_facts.description says Service orchestration and management tool.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Serf.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README states the former serf.io docs are now in the repository docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/hashicorp/serf; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes decentralized service discovery, orchestration, cluster membership, and gossip protocol.
